# utils.hdf5_store { #skrom.utils.hdf5_store }

`utils.hdf5_store`

hdf5_arraylist.py

Utilities to store and retrieve a Python list of NumPy arrays with variable shapes
in a single HDF5 file (chunked + compressed).

## Dependencies {.doc-section .doc-section-dependencies}

- numpy
- h5py

## Classes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [H5ArrayListSpec](#skrom.utils.hdf5_store.H5ArrayListSpec) | Naming spec for datasets in the group. |

### H5ArrayListSpec { #skrom.utils.hdf5_store.H5ArrayListSpec }

```python
utils.hdf5_store.H5ArrayListSpec(
    group='solutions',
    dataset_prefix='sol',
    digits=6,
)
```

Naming spec for datasets in the group.

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [iter_array_list_h5](#skrom.utils.hdf5_store.iter_array_list_h5) | Iterate arrays one-by-one (reduces peak RAM versus loading all at once). |
| [list_keys_h5](#skrom.utils.hdf5_store.list_keys_h5) | Return dataset keys under the target group. |
| [load_array_h5](#skrom.utils.hdf5_store.load_array_h5) | Load a single array by index. |
| [load_array_list_h5](#skrom.utils.hdf5_store.load_array_list_h5) | Load the full list into memory. |
| [load_metadata_h5](#skrom.utils.hdf5_store.load_metadata_h5) | Load optional metadata dict stored at save time; returns {} if absent. |
| [save_array_list_h5](#skrom.utils.hdf5_store.save_array_list_h5) | Save a list of arrays (variable shapes allowed) into a single HDF5 file. |

### iter_array_list_h5 { #skrom.utils.hdf5_store.iter_array_list_h5 }

```python
utils.hdf5_store.iter_array_list_h5(filepath, *, spec=H5ArrayListSpec())
```

Iterate arrays one-by-one (reduces peak RAM versus loading all at once).

### list_keys_h5 { #skrom.utils.hdf5_store.list_keys_h5 }

```python
utils.hdf5_store.list_keys_h5(filepath, *, spec=H5ArrayListSpec())
```

Return dataset keys under the target group.

### load_array_h5 { #skrom.utils.hdf5_store.load_array_h5 }

```python
utils.hdf5_store.load_array_h5(filepath, index, *, spec=H5ArrayListSpec())
```

Load a single array by index.

### load_array_list_h5 { #skrom.utils.hdf5_store.load_array_list_h5 }

```python
utils.hdf5_store.load_array_list_h5(filepath, *, spec=H5ArrayListSpec())
```

Load the full list into memory.

### load_metadata_h5 { #skrom.utils.hdf5_store.load_metadata_h5 }

```python
utils.hdf5_store.load_metadata_h5(filepath, *, spec=H5ArrayListSpec())
```

Load optional metadata dict stored at save time; returns {} if absent.

### save_array_list_h5 { #skrom.utils.hdf5_store.save_array_list_h5 }

```python
utils.hdf5_store.save_array_list_h5(
    filepath,
    arrays,
    *,
    spec=H5ArrayListSpec(),
    compression='gzip',
    compression_opts=4,
    chunks=True,
    overwrite=True,
    metadata=None,
)
```

Save a list of arrays (variable shapes allowed) into a single HDF5 file.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name             | Type                         | Description                                                                                                 | Default             |
|------------------|------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------|
| filepath         | Union\[str, \'Path\'\]       | Target .h5/.hdf5 path.                                                                                      | _required_          |
| arrays           | Sequence\[ArrayLike\]        | Sequence of array-like objects. Each entry is converted by np.asarray.                                      | _required_          |
| spec             | H5ArrayListSpec              | Group name and dataset naming scheme.                                                                       | `H5ArrayListSpec()` |
| compression      | Optional\[str\]              | HDF5 compression filter (e.g., "gzip", "lzf", None).                                                        | `'gzip'`            |
| compression_opts | Optional\[int\]              | Compression level for gzip (0-9). Ignored for None and some filters.                                        | `4`                 |
| chunks           | Union\[bool, tuple, None\]   | Use chunking (True/False) or pass an explicit chunk shape tuple. For compression, chunking must be enabled. | `True`              |
| overwrite        | bool                         | If True, recreate the file. If False, update/replace the target group.                                      | `True`              |
| metadata         | Optional\[Dict\[str, Any\]\] | Optional dict stored as JSON in group attrs ("metadata_json").                                              | `None`              |

#### Notes {.doc-section .doc-section-notes}

- Do not load untrusted HDF5 files if your workflow executes code based on
  stored metadata. The array payload itself is data-only.
